topic: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How)
keyPointsSummary: 'What' asks about things, 'Who/Whom' about people, 'Where' about place
'When' asks about time, 'Why' about reason, 'How' about manner/way
'Whose' asks about possession, 'Which' asks to choose among options
WH word always comes first in the question

quickQuiz.hindi: तुम्हें कौन सी किताब पसंद है?
तुम किससे बात कर रहे हो?

mustRememberRules: 'What' asks about things, 'Who/Whom' about people, 'Where' about place
'When' asks about time, 'Why' about reason, 'How' about manner/way
'Whose' asks about possession, 'Which' asks to choose among options
